title: Pereskia violacea
taxonomy: Pereskia violacea is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It is classified in the genus Pereskia, which contains about 13 species of flowering plants. The family Malpighiaceae is a group of flowering plants that are native to the Americas. Pereskia violacea is a member of the order Malpighiales, which consists of over 16,000 species of flowering plants. This classification indicates the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the plant kingdom.

intro: Pereskia violacea, also known as the rose cactus or violacea pereskia, is a type of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae.
